Name: Melt My Eyez, See Your Future

(5/3/2021) (UNLOCKED 1.5 officially releases)

Link(s): Melt My Eyez See Your Future is the fifth studio album by American rapper Denzel Curry, released through PH and Loma Vista Recordings on March 25, 2022. Denzel Curry first began envisioning the album's themes in 2018, and began working on it after the completion of his 2019 album, Zuu. He revealed the album title in a November 2021 interview with Las Vegas Weekly. Melt My Eyez is a metaphor for people's tendency to avoid facing difficult topics in day-to-day life, while See Your Future is motivation for moving on by putting one's past behind and focusing on what's yet to come.
